mapper.sql: select level_id, level_name, level_code, min_points, max_points, discount, sort, description, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time from sys_member_level
mapper.select: where del_flag = '0' AND level_name like concat('%', #{levelName}, '%') AND status = #{status} order by sort asc
where del_flag = '0' AND max_points is null order by min_points desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_member_level (level_name, level_code, min_points, max_points, discount, sort, description, status, create_time) values (#{levelName}, #{levelCode}, #{minPoints}, #{maxPoints}, #{discount}, #{sort}, #{description}, #{status}, sysdate())
mapper.delete: update sys_member_level set del_flag = '1' where level_id in #{levelId}
